_meta.description: Ground truth for the fixture screenshots in this directory. HP percentages were measured manually and pixel-exactly (fill-run width on the bar's middle row / 218 px total inner bar width, see scripts/measure_fill.py); they are independent of the production reader. Tests must compare HP with the tolerance below.
_meta.bar_note: The PokeMMO battle UI is rendered at a fixed pixel size: the enemy HP bar's inner width is 218 px in every fixture, including 1920x1080_resolution.png. The empty part of the bar is white with a diagonal crosshatch pattern, not dark.
_meta.location_note: location is the HUD text top-left without the ' Ch. N' channel suffix.
_meta.status_badge_note: Status badge sits left of the enemy name: SLP = gray 'Z', PAR = yellow lightning, PSN = purple skull (from full_health_trainer_battle_poisoned.png). BRN/FRZ have no fixture yet.
_meta.stat_stage_note: Some fixtures show an orange stat-stage box (e.g. '-1 Atk', '-2 Eva') to the right of the enemy HP bar. It is game UI for stat changes and must not disturb HP/status reading.

full_health_sleeping.png.notes: Game window is smaller than in the other Eterna fixtures; Windows taskbar visible at the bottom.

full_health_water.png.notes: Water battle; 'IronPixxelX sent out Smeargle!' textbox visible.

two_third_green_health_cave.png.notes: Move-selection submenu open; sandstorm haze over the scene.

yellow_health_no_status_cave.png.notes: Orange '-2 Eva' stat-stage box right of the HP bar.

red_health_no_status_cave.png.notes: Orange stat-stage box right of the HP bar.

1_HP_red_health_no_status_cave.png.notes: Exactly 1 HP; fill is a 2-3 px sliver. Reader must report a value > 0.

1_HP_red_health_sleeping_cave.png.notes: Exactly 1 HP; fill is a 2-3 px sliver. Reader must report a value > 0.

red_health_paralyzed.png.notes: Double battle with one enemy already fainted: one enemy bar left, but two ally bars (Rotom, Staravia) visible. v1 ignores double battles.

double_battle_no_status.png.notes: Two stacked enemy bars; orange '-1 Atk' stat-stage box next to each.

full_health_trainer_battle_poisoned.png.notes: Enemy poisoned at full HP (purple skull badge). Own Roserade also has a status badge.

overworld_wild_running.png.notes: On a route with wild grass nearby; still no battle UI.

1920x1080_resolution.png.notes: 1920x1080 client resolution; battle UI elements keep their fixed pixel size (bar still 218 px).

login_screen.png.notes: PokeMMO login screen (dark Zekrom over a light backdrop). Has no enemy HP bar; must NOT be detected as a battle even though dark pixels exist in the bottom region.

_action_fixtures_note: Single battle frames captured at the moment an action resolves, for the turn counter (milestone 2). A turn is counted only when a committed-action textbox appears (not when the menu merely closes, e.g. BAG -> cancel). Battle text shows bottom-left of the viewport. Filenames keep the user's spelling ('batle_').

batle_action_pokeball_thrown.png.notes: Pokeball mid-throw animation; no textbox in this frame.

_chat_minimized_note: Battle frames captured right after an attack animation with the chat minimized, at different window sizes. These show the in-viewport narration textbox (which would be the only turn cue with the chat hidden) and confirm the HP-bar vanish/return behaviour: during the zoom/attack animation the enemy HP bar is gone (frame 1), and it reappears just after (frames 2-4). The turn counter's chat-independent fallback keys on that vanish/return cycle. 'bar_visible' is whether read_enemy_bars should find the enemy HP bar in this exact frame.

batle_action_attack_chat_minimized_1.png.notes: Mid attack animation; HP bar hidden.

_catch_fixtures_note: Frames from a successful capture. The catch is detected from the chat log line 'Gotcha! X was caught!' (read_chat.caught), which also ends the battle once the enemy bar is gone.

batle_action_pokemon_catched_dark_pokeba.notes: Pokeball resting on the field; enemy sprite replaced by the ball, enemy HP bar still shown, no catch text yet.

batle_action_pokemon_catched_text_after.notes: In-viewport and chat show 'Gotcha! ... was caught!'.
